component.name: Mural
component.summary: The wallpaper manager GNOME was missing

description.p: Mural is a wallpaper manager for GNOME. Browse your image collection, preview in full size, and set your wallpaper in one click.

ul.li: Browse and apply wallpapers from any folder
Set a different wallpaper on each monitor natively
Automatic slideshow with configurable interval, random or sequential
Optional AVIF compression to reduce file sizes without touching originals
